message:
chore: add macOS resource forks and browser screenshots to .gitignore

Add patterns for ephemeral files that keep showing up as untracked:
- ._* (macOS resource fork metadata files)
- Chrome_*.png, Firefox_*.png, Safari_*.png (temp browser screenshots
  from visual testing/debugging)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,14 @@ pnpm-lock.yaml
 .DS_Store
 *.pem
 
+# macOS resource forks
+._*
+
+# Browser screenshots (temp captures from testing/debugging)
+Chrome_*.png
+Firefox_*.png
+Safari_*.png
+
 # debug
 npm-debug.log*
 yarn-debug.log*
